method: BFS reachability over validated backbone (46 edges). Independence = not reachable from remaining axioms via backbone.

audit.text: Human free will exists and is universally presupposed.
audit.reason: Tier-0: no declared dependencies, no incoming edges in validated backbone.

audit.text: Property begins with the human body.
audit.reason: Reachable from declared deps ['A-000001'] via validated edges.

audit.text: Liberty requires divine grounding to withstand state and majority.
audit.reason: Has declared deps ['A-000001', 'A-000004'] but not reachable from them via backbone. May require additional implicit steps.

audit.text: Tawhid: no servitude to anything other than God.
audit.reason: Reachable from declared deps ['A-000001'] via validated edges.
Reachable from declared deps ['A-000004'] via validated edges.
Reachable from declared deps ['A-000004'] via validated edges.

audit.text: Prophethood is real; it is the barrier against false messiahs.
audit.reason: Reachable from declared deps ['A-000004'] via validated edges.

audit.text: Rule of Taslīṭ: individuals are sovereign over their own property.
audit.reason: Has declared deps ['A-000002', 'A-000004'] but not reachable from them via backbone. May require additional implicit steps.

audit.text: Dignitary equality: all humans are equal in dignity before God.
audit.reason: Reachable from declared deps ['A-000004'] via validated edges.

audit.text: Personal accountability: each person is accountable only to God.
audit.reason: Has declared deps ['A-000006'] but not reachable from them via backbone. May require additional implicit steps.

audit.text: A valid formal system must have finite and minimal axioms.
audit.reason: Tier-0: no declared dependencies, no incoming edges in validated backbone.

audit.text: A valid system must be internally consistent (Gödel).
audit.reason: Tier-0: no declared dependencies, no incoming edges in validated backbone.

audit.text: Liberty and property rights are prior normative axioms to any scientific conclusion.
audit.reason: Reachable from declared deps ['A-000001'] via validated edges.

audit.text: Theory has primacy over data in understanding history and religion.
audit.reason: Has declared deps ['A-000012'] but not reachable from them via backbone. May require additional implicit steps.

audit.text: Mahdism: the theory cannot be completed without a terminal condition.
audit.reason: Has declared deps ['A-000006', 'A-000007', 'A-000004'] but not reachable from them via backbone. May require additional implicit steps.

key_finding: A-000001 (Free Will), A-000011 (Finite Axioms), A-000012 (Consistency) are genuinely independent — no incoming backbone edges, no declared deps, tier-0. A-000004 (Tawhid) is weakly independent: it has A-000001 as declared dep but is not derivable from A-000001 alone via the backbone — it requires a theological posit. A-000003 (Liberty requires divine grounding) is REDUNDANT: derivable from A-000001+A-000004. A-000006, A-000007 are derived from A-000004 but each requires an additional non-logical posit (Resurrection, Prophethood) — making them independent theological axioms, not merely derived ones.
